title: INSERT INTO ... EXCEPT ... fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tmp_c (id UInt64, name String, value Decimal(10,2));
CREATE TABLE tmp_d (id UInt64, name String, value Decimal(10,2));
INSERT INTO tmp_c SELECT name, value FROM tmp_d WHERE (name, value) NOT IN (SELECT name, value FROM tmp_c);
key_bug_features: INSERT INTO with EXCEPT clause fails
